title: Senior AI-Enabled Engineer, Vice President
company_focus:
Global investment management and financial technology
(Aladdin platform)
description:
About this role

Our technology supports Portfolio Management teams
overseeing over $14 trillion in assets, and the products you
build will sit at the heart of tools used daily by investors
making decisions that impact millions of people worldwide.
It’s engineering work with real reach, real complexity, and
real impact.

Aladdin Portfolio Management Engineering is a global team of
passionate product engineers who are on a mission to build
out a next generation platform of persona based, workflow
driven experience with a horizontally scalable & modular
architecture.

Responsibilities:

- Hands-On Technical Delivery - actively lead or contributed
  to enterprise-level projects, spanning Technical Design
  and Deployment Readiness Reviews, Core Reviews, and
  comprehensive engagement across the full PDLC.
- Accelerate productivity with an AI-enabled PDLC with a
  strong focus on quality & resiliency.
- Provide operational excellence to our clients with
  production support with an “SRE” mindset.
- Influence and mentor other engineers in the team, raising
  the bar on technical excellence.
- Collaborate in a global, multi-office environment, aligning
  teams across geographies around shared architectural
  vision.
- Champion a strong engineering culture grounded in continuous
  learning and optimizing to best practices such as DORA.
- Build domain and technical context quickly and translate
  that into specifications, plans and actionable Agile
  backlogs.

Qualifications:

- ·B.S. / M.S. degree in a STEM field such as Computer Science
  or Engineering
- 6+ years of proven experience

Skills and Experience:

- Proven experience operating as a Senior Engineer or Team
  Lead, defining and delivering technical projects across
  initiatives with Agile Practices such as Lean or Scaled
  Agile.
- Demonstrated ability to act as a work definer at scale:
  shaping ambiguous problem spaces into well-structured
  initiatives, clear architectural runways, and executable
  delivery plans.
- Strong background designing enterprise scale, distributed
  systems, balancing functional requirements with non-
  functional concerns such as resiliency, scalability,
  latency, and operability.
- Hands on experience with AI enabled SDLC / PDLC practices,
  including:

- Using AI to accelerate design exploration, prototyping, and
  architectural decision making

- Applying AI assisted development, testing, code review, and
  documentation practices

- Embedding AI capabilities into product workflows and
  platform services responsibly and securely

- Frameworks such as Windsurf & Cursor and GitHub Copilot

- Ability to partner effectively with Product Management,
  Engineering, and Business leaders to translate strategic
  objectives into coherent architectural strategies.
- Excellent communication and influencing skills, able to
  articulate complex architectural and technical concepts to
  senior stakeholders and align diverse teams behind a
  shared technical vision.
- Track record at articulating architectural tradeoffs and
  design options, including impacts on scalability,
  resilience, cost, and delivery velocity.
- A proven foundation in modern languages such Core Java and
  UI technologies such as React & Angular.
- Experience of API design principles & Event Driven
  Architecture.
- Rigorous approach to quality through demonstrable TDD & BDD
  experience.

Nice to have and opportunities to learn:

- Expertise in Domain Driven Design (DDD), including domain
  modelling and aligning architecture to complex business
  domains.
- Front office Portfolio Management or Wealth Management
  domain experience, with a strong understanding of
  investment workflows, decision making processes, and the
  role of technology in supporting portfolio managers and
  advisors.
- Domain knowledge of asset classes & analytics (e.g.,
  equities, fixed income, multi asset, alternatives) and how
  their characteristics influence risk, performance,
  liquidity, and system design.
- Experience with portfolio construction concepts, including
  asset allocation, constraints, benchmarks, rebalancing,
  and optimization, and how these map to scalable platform
  and architecture decisions.
- Exposure to event driven architectures at scale, including
  microservices, messaging, and streaming platforms aligned
  to business domains.
- Experience shaping or contributing to platform strategies
  that enable multiple product teams to move faster with
  consistency and autonomy.
- Familiarity with cloud native and hybrid architectures,
  including patterns for scalability, resilience, and cost
  aware design in large enterprises – including frameworks
  like Kubernetes.
- Exposure to modern DevOps and platform engineering practices
  that support high throughput, high quality delivery at
  enterprise scale, and demonstrable improvements across
  DORA metrics.
- Familiarity with micro frontend architectures, including
  their use in large scale, multi team environments to
  enable independent domain ownership, parallel delivery,
  and consistent user experiences across complex platfor

Our benefits

To help you stay energized, engaged and inspired, we offer a
wide range of employee benefits including: retirement
investment and tools designed to help you in building a
sound financial future; access to education reimbursement;
comprehensive resources to support your physical health and
emotional well-being; family support programs; and Flexible
Time Off (FTO) so you can relax, recharge and be there for
the people you care about.

Our hybrid work model

BlackRock’s hybrid work model is designed to enable a
culture of collaboration and apprenticeship that enriches
the experience of our employees, while supporting
flexibility for all. Employees are currently required to
work at least 4 days in the office per week, with the
flexibility to work from home 1 day a week. Some business
groups may require more time in the office due to their
roles and responsibilities. We remain focused on increasing
the impactful moments that arise when we work together in
person – aligned with our commitment to performance and
innovation. As a new joiner, you can count on this hybrid
model to accelerate your learning and onboarding experience
here at BlackRock.

About BlackRock

At BlackRock, we are all connected by one mission: to help
more and more people experience financial well-being.  Our
clients, and the people they serve, are saving for
retirement, paying for their children’s educations, buying
homes and starting businesses. Their investments also help
to strengthen the global economy: support businesses small
and large; finance infrastructure projects that connect and
power cities; and facilitate innovations that drive
progress.

This mission would not be possible without our smartest
investment – the one we make in our employees. It’s why
we’re dedicated to creating an environment where our
colleagues feel welcomed, valued and supported with
networks, benefits and development opportunities to help
them thrive.

For additional information on BlackRock, please visit
@blackrock | Twitter: @blackrock | LinkedIn:
www.linkedin.com/company/blackrock

BlackRock is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.  We
evaluate qualified applicants without regard to age,
disability, race, religion, sex, sexual orientation and
other protected characteristics at law.
responsibilities: Lead enterprise-level technical projects spanning design, deployment readiness, and full product development lifecycle
Accelerate productivity through AI-enabled PDLC practices with focus on quality and resiliency
Provide operational excellence with production support following an SRE mindset
Mentor and influence other engineers to raise the bar on technical excellence
Collaborate across global teams to align around shared architectural vision
Champion engineering culture grounded in continuous learning and DORA best practices
Build domain and technical context quickly, translating it into specifications and Agile backlogs
Design and deliver scalable distributed systems balancing functional and non-functional requirements
use_cases: Portfolio management platform supporting $14 trillion in assets under management
AI-assisted software development lifecycle acceleration (code review, testing, documentation)
Embedding AI capabilities into product workflows and platform services for investment decisions
Enterprise-scale distributed systems for front office portfolio and wealth management
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is titled "AI-Enabled Engineer" but the core work
is building enterprise software platforms for portfolio
management at BlackRock. The AI aspects are about using AI
tools (Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot) to accelerate
software development and embedding some AI capabilities into
product workflows — not building, training, or fine-tuning
AI/ML models. The primary focus is enterprise-scale
distributed systems engineering for the Aladdin platform.
